repo_prior_art.cite: none; the panel catalogue contains no PPML cohort-time population-mean lemma

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT §3 states the same staggered potential-outcome/exponential-mean setup.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; doc/API.md §1 contains linear FWL/history-cell results, not a PPML pseudo-true projection.

published_prior_art.cite: White1982MisspecifiedML §§2–3 gives the pseudo-true QMLE score and convergence framework; MoreauKastler2025PTT §3.1 supplies the PPML staggered-treatment instance.

repo_prior_art.cite: q1_sign_flip — linear Bernoulli-history FWL sign threshold, not an endogenous PPML score root.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT eq. (3.6) displays the heterogeneous PPML wrong-comparison mechanism, but no verified source states this general mean-weighted-FWL derivative identity.

repo_prior_art.cite: q1_sign_flip is a linear closed-form threshold and does not eliminate PPML pseudo-true margins.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT §3.1/equation (3.6) treats a 2x3 illustration; no verified paper supplies a finite primitive multicohort PPML sign-frontier characterization.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The claimed full pseudo-true-score/plim result is a direct finite-dimensional application of White1982MisspecifiedML, not a distinct PPML causal frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1 / def:global-sign-reversal-region
soundness_flags.one_line: R_T is a region in counts, baselines, and the full effect vector delta, yet the requested necessary-and-sufficient boundary omits delta; it must either retain delta or explicitly characterize the projection/existence set over positive delta.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1, Theorem 2, and Open-ended Question 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Z_gt includes dummies for every 2,...,T although C may omit those cohorts, making the asserted full-rank condition impossible for the advertised arbitrary adoption supports; index fixed effects by C or restrict C to the full support.

soundness_flags.label: Lemma 1 / Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: B_gt and the treated conditional mean suppress unit index i under a complete-array law without an exchangeability or cohort-average convergence premise, so the stated cell table is not yet linked to the sample PPML objective.

soundness_flags.label: ass:required-cohort-support
soundness_flags.one_line: The exact requirement C contains {2,3,4,infinity} is a proposal-specific scope restriction, not the standard staggered-adoption support condition supplied by deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2020TWFE.

soundness_flags.label: ass:independent-trajectories / ass:outcome-lyapunov-moment
soundness_flags.one_line: White1982MisspecifiedML assumes independent observations with a common distribution and does not support the named non-identical triangular-array independence-plus-Lyapunov condition; cite an appropriate triangular-array QMLE/LLN result or retag and justify it.

soundness_flags.label: ass:bounded-baseline-masses
soundness_flags.one_line: With fixed T, finite C, and B_gt already declared positive finite scalars, finite positive lower and upper bounds exist automatically unless B_gt is redefined as an N-varying sequence.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Restate the frontier as either beta_star(delta)=0 in (pi,B,delta), or as an explicitly defined projected design set { (pi,B): there exists delta>0 with beta_star(delta)<0 }; then make the elimination handle target that exact object.

Define cohort means as within-cohort averages (or impose within-cohort exchangeability), state their triangular-array convergence, and index Z only by observed cohorts so the population and sample PPML problems have the same support.

Make the field kernel a generic T>=4 separation from Moreau-Kastler's 2x3 formula: derive its exact 2x3 sign region and prove a new multicohort primitive frontier or a computable screening/correction rule beyond that region.

recommended_next_step: Revise the population/support definitions and give the frontier its missing delta or projected-existence quantifier; retain the repaired primitive PPML sign-frontier question as the field-level kernel.
